title: [Clone Firm] Warning: LCXAirdrop(dot)com
text: The Financial Market Authority (FMA) Liechtenstein points out that there is no connection between the website LCXAirdrop(dot)com and LCX AG, Herrengasse 6, 9490 Vaduz, (registration number: FL-0002.580.678-2). The operators of the website LCXAirdrop(dot)com are wrongfully making use of the name and identity of the aforementioned Liechtenstein company, which is a registered TT service provider.
